author: y4rr
content: Decision: Used composite-op approach for all sub-networks (FPN, RPN, detection head). Every op dispatches through existing ferrotorch-nn primitives (Conv2d, Linear, relu, interpolate) which already have GPU dispatch. No new GPU kernels needed for this sprint — that would be GPU dispatch for the underlying ops, which is pre-existing. This matches PyTorch's CompositeImplicitAutograd pattern.
